title: Man page for podman-compose should include table for containers.conf options.
body:
### Issue Description

Hello! Thanks for all the hard work on podman.

The man page for podman-compose includes setting two fields in containers.conf. It does not, however, say which table in containers.conf. This omission has lead to at least Issue #23963 where one comment fortunately says it is in the "engine" table. The source for the man page is `docs/source/markdown/podman-compose.1.md.in`.

I would provide a patch but I don't presently have GPG signing setup and the fix is trivial.



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Read the man page to podman-compose(1) and find you don't know what table to put the config in.
2.
3.


### Describe the results you received

No table described to enter the config.

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

### podman info output

```yaml
Documentation issue only.
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Documentation issue.

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
> I would provide a patch but I don't presently have GPG signing setup and the fix is trivial.

We do not require an gpg singing, we just need the proper DCO sign off line which has nothing to do with actual signatures
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs

So please open a PR with a fix.
